name: cad-design
description: Parametric CAD design disciplines for makers, mechanical engineers, and product designers. 5 skills covering CAD API scripting (Fusion 360, OpenSCAD, commercial platforms), parametric construction workflows, mechanical design principles (overhangs, walls, tool-less assembly), image-to-mesh-CAD pipelines, and the Fusion 360 MCP-Bridge API quirks for Claude-driven CAD automation.
